source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for precise enterprise dashboards with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, dense metrics, accessible contrast, and compact multilingual readability.
layout: Disciplined 8px-grid enterprise layouts with sharp black-white contrast, deep ocean-blue actions, sonar-line texture, graphite borders, restrained shadows, and dorsal-fin navigation cues.

prompts.label: Transparent Orca motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on flat #00ff00 chroma key, then local remove_chroma_key.py alpha extraction with border auto-key, soft matte, and despill.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Orca transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated orca motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single full-body orca (killer whale) in a graceful side-facing swimming arc, accurate anatomy with tall dorsal fin, rounded pectoral fins, black back, crisp white eye patch, white underside, subtle wet skin sheen, and small hints of deep ocean blue reflected along the edges. The orca should feel iconic, high-contrast, premium, enterprise-ready, and suitable as a catalog motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full orca from nose to tail without cropping; one orca only.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves black-and-white markings, smooth body volume, crisp silhouette edges, and subtle ocean-blue rim highlights.
Transparent workflow: place the orca on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the orca fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the orca.
Constraints: no ocean scene, no waves, no splashes, no bubbles, no rocks, no sky, no second animal, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-orca/design-system-light.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Orca" / "Orca", a high contrast enterprise system derived from an isolated black-and-white orca motif with Pacific coast ocean-blue context. The board is the implementation reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme.
Reference use: Use the orca motif as source of truth: crisp black back, white eye patch, white underside, smooth wet skin sheen, ocean-blue rim light, Pacific coast depth, powerful streamlined silhouette, and high-contrast pattern language.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
Resolution and legibility: make every section label large and readable after gallery downscaling. Use fewer large rows, no dense tiny token tables, precise grid, generous spacing.
Required visible sections with exactly these short labels: Morphous Orca, Orca, Light Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance. Show concise examples: Inter, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語, 余白, 可読性, 行間. Use enterprise UI type hierarchy with compact metrics and strong contrast.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, system health tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: crisp white and cool pearl page background, black-ink headers, deep pacific blue primary actions, sea-glass secondary, orca-white cards, graphite borders, sharp black-white section dividers, subtle sonar-line texture and dorsal-fin curves, 8px radii, disciplined enterprise dashboard layout.
Color palette: orca black, orca white, deep ocean blue, pacific cyan, fog grey, graphite, signal amber, status red, kelp green used sparingly.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs. Use exact title text "Morphous Orca".
Constraints: no beach photo scene, no cluttered whale photos, no repeated animal wallpaper, no neon overload, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Orca".

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for /systems/morphous-orca/design-system-dark.png
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Orca" / "Orca". It must feel like the same system translated from the light-mode Morphous Orca board and the same black-white ocean-blue orca motif, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the orca motif and light board concept as references. Preserve the high-contrast enterprise palette roles, orca pattern rhythm, Pacific coast context, component language, sonar-line texture, spacing, typography, dashboard/data density, and shadcn/tweakcn coverage. Translate crisp white surfaces into deep orca black, midnight graphite, and Pacific blue surfaces with pearl foregrounds.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840 x 2160 pixels, 4K-class composition.
Resolution and legibility: make every section label large and readable after gallery downscaling. Use fewer large rows, no dense tiny token tables, precise grid, generous spacing.
Required visible sections with exactly these short labels: Morphous Orca, Orca, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance. Show concise examples: Inter, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語, 余白, 可読性, 行間. Use enterprise UI type hierarchy with compact metrics and strong contrast.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, system health tile, loading, empty, error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual details: deep orca-black background, midnight-blue cards, pearl text, cool white panel highlights, pacific-blue primary actions, cyan focus rings, graphite borders, white eye-patch accent shapes, subtle sonar-line texture, dorsal-fin curves, 8px radii, disciplined enterprise dashboard layout.
Color palette: orca black, pearl white, deep ocean blue, pacific cyan, midnight graphite, fog grey, signal amber, status red, kelp green used sparingly.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs. Use exact title text "Morphous Orca".
Constraints: no beach photo scene, no cluttered whale photos, no repeated animal wallpaper, no neon overload, no flat pure-black-only background, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random logos, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Orca".
